name: Turkey Paprikash
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the turkey 1/4 inch thick.
2. Spray a cold large skillet with nonstick spray. Heat over medium heat for 1 minute.
3. Add turkey slices to the skillet. Cover and cook about 3 minutes or until heated through. Remove turkey slices from the skillet and keep warm.
4. For the sauce, add onion rings to the skillet. Cook and stir until the rings are tender but not brown.
5. Carefully stir in paprika, bouillon granules, 3/4 cup water, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
6. Combine yogurt, flour, and tomato paste; stir into the skillet.
7. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
8. Cook and stir for an additional minute.
9. Toss parsley with hot cooked noodles.
10. Arrange noodles on a large serving platter.
11. Top with turkey slices.
12. Spoon some sauce over the turkey; pass the remaining sauce alongside.
